title: Forklift Sales
desc: New and used forklifts from trusted brands. We help you find the right capacity, fuel type and mast configuration for your operations — with full warranty and aftersales support.

title: Forklift Rental
desc: Short and long-term rental packages with flexible terms — daily, monthly or project-based. Ideal for peak seasons and project sites without capital investment.

title: Service & Maintenance
desc: Scheduled preventive maintenance, breakdown repair, and DOSH safety inspections. Our certified technicians respond within 24 hours — minimising your downtime.

title: Spare Parts Supply
desc: Genuine and OEM-equivalent spare parts for all major forklift brands. We maintain stock of fast-moving parts and can source specialty items with quick turnaround.

title: Operator Training
desc: DOSH-recognised forklift operator training — theory, practical and assessment. Ensure your team operates safely, legally and confidently.

title: Fleet Management
desc: End-to-end fleet management for large operations — usage tracking, maintenance scheduling, cost reporting and fleet optimisation advisory.
